feedback: The onboarding checklist was clear and our team got productive quickly.

We saw solid uptime this month and that improved confidence across the operations team.
Pricing is acceptable for now though finance keeps asking for clearer value metrics.

A duplicate invoice created unnecessary back and forth with accounts payable.
Documentation is improving but webhook examples still lag behind the product.
